attributes.name: has-before
attributes.description: Set when before slot content exists, allowing the component to adjust leading spacing, layout columns, and slot-aware styling.

attributes.name: has-after
attributes.description: Set when after slot content exists, allowing the component to adjust trailing spacing, layout columns, and slot-aware styling.

attributes.name: has-before
attributes.description: Set when before slot content exists, allowing the component to adjust leading spacing, layout columns, and slot-aware styling.

attributes.name: has-after
attributes.description: Set when after slot content exists, allowing the component to adjust trailing spacing, layout columns, and slot-aware styling.

attributes.name: has-video
attributes.description: Set when video thumbnail content exists, allowing the action to clear default chrome and let the media card own the visual surface.

attributes.name: has-avatar-chip
attributes.description: Set when Avatar Chip content exists in the default slot, allowing the action surface to hug and start-align the composed identity row.

attributes.name: icon-only
attributes.description: Set when the default slot contains only icon content, allowing the component to apply icon-only sizing, padding, and accessible-name expectations.

attributes.name: avatar-only
attributes.description: Set when the default slot contains only an avatar, allowing the component to remove normal action chrome and preserve avatar sizing.

attributes.name: dropdown-slot
attributes.description: Applied to actions rendered inside dropdown content, allowing the action to inherit dropdown item sizing and alignment.

attributes.name: dropdown-slot-first
attributes.description: Applied to the first dropdown action, allowing edge radius and spacing to match the dropdown surface.

attributes.name: dropdown-slot-last
attributes.description: Applied to the last dropdown action, allowing edge radius and spacing to match the dropdown surface.

attributes.name: alert-slot
attributes.description: Applied to alert action content, allowing the action to match the alert layout and tone.

attributes.name: alert-positive-slot
attributes.description: Applied to positive alert action content, allowing the action to match the positive alert tone.

attributes.name: alert-info-slot
attributes.description: Applied to info alert action content, allowing the action to match the info alert tone.

attributes.name: alert-warning-slot
attributes.description: Applied to warning alert action content, allowing the action to match the warning alert tone.

attributes.name: alert-attention-slot
attributes.description: Applied to attention alert action content, allowing the action to match the attention alert tone.

attributes.name: has-before
attributes.description: Set when before slot content exists, allowing the component to adjust leading spacing, layout columns, and slot-aware styling.

attributes.name: has-after
attributes.description: Set when after slot content exists, allowing the component to adjust trailing spacing, layout columns, and slot-aware styling.

attributes.name: has-header
attributes.description: Set when header content exists, allowing the component to adjust internal spacing and structural regions.

attributes.name: has-footer
attributes.description: Set when footer content exists, allowing the component to adjust internal spacing and structural regions.

attributes.name: has-message
attributes.description: Set when supporting message content exists, allowing the field layout to reserve space and connect the message treatment.

attributes.name: has-header
attributes.description: Set when header content exists, allowing the component to adjust internal spacing and structural regions.

attributes.name: has-footer
attributes.description: Set when footer content exists, allowing the component to adjust internal spacing and structural regions.

attributes.name: has-rule
attributes.description: Set when a rule is present, allowing the footer layout to account for the divider.

attributes.name: has-before
attributes.description: Set when before slot content exists, allowing the component to adjust leading spacing, layout columns, and slot-aware styling.

attributes.name: has-after
attributes.description: Set when after slot content exists, allowing the component to adjust trailing spacing, layout columns, and slot-aware styling.

attributes.name: has-video
attributes.description: Set when video thumbnail content exists, allowing the action to clear default chrome and let the media card own the visual surface.

attributes.name: icon-only
attributes.description: Set when the default slot contains only icon content, allowing the component to apply icon-only sizing, padding, and accessible-name expectations.

attributes.name: avatar-only
attributes.description: Set when the default slot contains only an avatar, allowing the component to remove normal action chrome and preserve avatar sizing.

attributes.name: has-actions
attributes.description: Set when action content exists, allowing the prompt layout to reserve action space and align controls.

attributes.name: has-extra-actions
attributes.description: Set when extra action content exists, allowing the prompt layout to switch to the expanded action treatment.

attributes.name: has-error
attributes.description: Set when error content exists, allowing the component to expose the error layout and visual treatment.

attributes.name: has-header
attributes.description: Set when header content exists, allowing the component to adjust internal spacing and structural regions.

attributes.name: has-footer
attributes.description: Set when footer content exists, allowing the component to adjust internal spacing and structural regions.

attributes.name: has-notes
attributes.description: Set when notes content exists, allowing the slide frame to reserve and style the notes region.

attributes.name: notes-visible
attributes.description: Set when notes are visible, allowing the slide frame to expose the notes region.

attributes.name: has-chrome
attributes.description: Set when frame chrome is present, allowing the slide frame to adjust presentation spacing.

attributes.name: data-slide-section
attributes.description: Applied to slide section children, allowing the slide frame to identify and manage slide sections.

attributes.name: slide-active
attributes.description: Applied to the active slide section, allowing the slide frame to show the current section.

attributes.name: slide-hidden
attributes.description: Applied to hidden slide sections, allowing the slide frame to hide inactive sections.

attributes.name: has-before
attributes.description: Set when before slot content exists, allowing the component to adjust leading spacing, layout columns, and slot-aware styling.

attributes.name: has-after
attributes.description: Set when after slot content exists, allowing the component to adjust trailing spacing, layout columns, and slot-aware styling.

attributes.name: in-card
attributes.description: Set when rendered inside a card context, allowing the component to inherit card-aware spacing and divider treatment.

attributes.name: in-form-section
attributes.description: Set when rendered inside a form section, allowing the component to inherit form-section divider treatment.

attributes.name: in-dialog
attributes.description: Set when rendered inside a dialog, allowing the component to inherit dialog-aware divider treatment.

attributes.name: in-drawer
attributes.description: Set when rendered inside a drawer, allowing the component to inherit drawer-aware divider treatment.

attributes.name: has-card-slat-group
attributes.description: Set when card slat group content exists, allowing the card body to tune internal spacing for grouped slats.

attributes.name: has-accordion-slat-group
attributes.description: Set when accordion slat group content exists, allowing the card body to tune internal spacing for grouped accordions.

attributes.name: inner-space-top
attributes.description: Set when top inner spacing is needed, allowing the card body to adjust vertical rhythm.

attributes.name: card-slot
attributes.description: Applied to a slotted child used in card composition, allowing the child to style itself for a card context.

attributes.name: first-child
attributes.description: Applied to the first structural child, allowing edge spacing and borders to be adjusted.

attributes.name: last-child
attributes.description: Applied to the last structural child, allowing edge spacing and borders to be adjusted.

attributes.name: has-button-group
attributes.description: Set when a button group is present, allowing the footer layout to adjust action spacing.

attributes.name: usage
attributes.description: Set when rendered in a named usage context, allowing the component to switch to usage-specific styling.

attributes.name: card-slot
attributes.description: Applied to a slotted child used in card composition, allowing the child to style itself for a card context.

attributes.name: condensed-slot
attributes.description: Applied to a slotted child used in condensed composition, allowing the child to reduce spacing and density.

attributes.name: in-card
attributes.description: Set when rendered inside a card context, allowing the component to inherit card-aware spacing and divider treatment.

attributes.name: card-slot
attributes.description: Applied to a table used in card composition, allowing the table to style itself for a card context.
